prompt: Design program structure for 5 projects delivering an enterprise platform.
Coordinate resource conflict: 3 projects need the same DBA during the same sprint.
assertions: identifies conflict with specific dates and impact
assesses schedule impact of each option

prompt: Aggregate status from 5 projects into program dashboard.
assertions: normalizes metrics across different project methodologies

prompt: Ensure program benefits exceed sum of individual project benefits.
assertions: quantifies program-level benefits not visible at project level
tracks benefit realization at program level
